name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provi...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provi...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?

Once you share it, I can help you with:
Copying/formatting it
Analyzing its content
Creating files with it
Modifying it according to your needs
Or any other task you have in mind

What would you like me to do?" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?
Once you share it, I can help you with:
Copying/formatting it
Analyzing its content
Creating files with it
Modifying it according to your needs
Or any other task you have in mind
What would you like me to do?"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?
  + 
    Once you share it, I can help you with:
    Copying/formatting it
    Analyzing its content
    Creating files with it
    Modifying it according to your needs
    Or any other task you have in mind
  + 
    What would you like me to do?
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provi...

Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?\n\nOnce you share it, I can help you with:\nCopying/formatting it\nAnalyzing its content\nCreating files with it\nModifying it according to your needs\nOr any other task you have in mind\n\nWhat would you like me to do?" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see a message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?\nOnce you share it, I can help you with:\nCopying/formatting it\nAnalyzing its content\nCreating files with it\nModifying it according to your needs\nOr any other task you have in mind\nWhat would you like me to do?"
